/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -flto=auto -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto  -o wavetaskplugin.so CMakeFiles/wavetaskplugin.dir/wavetaskplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavetaskplugin.dir/wavetaskplugin_PearDockPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alxb421/Desktop/pkgbuilds/pearos-dock/dist/src/pearos-dock-26.6.3/build/bin ../bin/libwavetaskplugin.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
